_meta.notes: v3 design: balanced truth direction to disambiguate rater bias. See TOPIC_CANDIDATES_v3.md.

cochrane_truth.effect_estimate_approx: no benefit, possible harm at high doses
cochrane_truth.note: Vivekananthan DP et al + Cochrane antioxidant SRs

topics.intervention: routine antibiotic prophylaxis before dental procedures
topics.population: healthy adults without high-risk cardiac conditions

cochrane_truth.effect_estimate_approx: not recommended in low-risk patients; harms outweigh benefits
cochrane_truth.note: Glenny AM et al, AHA 2007+ guidelines

topics.pubmed_query: (antibiotic prophylaxis) AND (dental procedures) AND (infective endocarditis) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)

topics.population: women undergoing vaginal childbirth (compared to restrictive policy)

cochrane_truth.effect_estimate_approx: restrictive policy reduces severe perineal trauma; routine NOT beneficial

topics.pubmed_query: (episiotomy) AND (vaginal birth OR vaginal delivery) AND (perineal trauma) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)
